name: pm-skills
description: 产品经理完整工作流 Skills Plugin — 从知识摄入到需求探索到 PRD 撰写，可选原型验证

interface.shortDescription: 产品经理工作流：知识引擎→脑暴→PRD→可选原型验证
interface.longDescription: PM Skills provides a product manager workflow: knowledge ingestion via MinerU/qmd, brainstorming design, PRD writing. Optionally enters prototyping (tech spec + implementation plan + scaffold code) when user chooses. Includes prd-reconcile for merging multiple PRD documents.
defaultPrompt: 帮我从知识到PRD走一遍完整流程
